title: Micro Fighters
description: Fully Server-side tiny fighters / clay / terracotta soldiers. No client-mods, no resource pack needed!
body:
# Micro Fighters Mod 🛡️

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mCLvosIh/images/095047fa278e8e883e245e927909560268f4bc98.png)

A simple, server-side mod that brings customizable micro warriors into your Minecraft world/server — no client-side mods, no resource packs required! 

Build small armies out of different colored fighters, each crafted using soul sand and colored terracotta. 

- Completely server-side 🖥️
- Requires **zero** downloads from players ⚙️

It's a cool way to add some small-scale combat to your world without a hassle. 

Perfect for servers looking for lightweight, fun mechanics!

### Crafting Recipes 🧱

| Fighter Color      | Recipe Ingredients                          |
|--------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| **Disintegrator**   | `Eye of Ender` + `Redstone Dust` + `Any Button`            |
| **White Fighter**   | `Soul Sand` + `White Terracotta`            |
| **Black Fighter**   | `Soul Sand` + `Black Terracotta`            |
| **Gray Fighter**    | `Soul Sand` + `Gray Terracotta`             |
| **Light Gray Fighter** | `Soul Sand` + `Light Gray Terracotta`    |
| **Cyan Fighter**    | `Soul Sand` + `Cyan Terracotta`             |
| **Brown Fighter**   | `Soul Sand` + `Brown Terracotta`            |
| **Orange Fighter**  | `Soul Sand` + `Orange Terracotta`           |
| **Yellow Fighter**  | `Soul Sand` + `Yellow Terracotta`           |
| **Magenta Fighter** | `Soul Sand` + `Magenta Terracotta`          |
| **Purple Fighter**  | `Soul Sand` + `Purple Terracotta`           |
| **Blue Fighter**    | `Soul Sand` + `Blue Terracotta`             |
| **Light Blue Fighter** | `Soul Sand` + `Light Blue Terracotta`    |
| **Green Fighter**   | `Soul Sand` + `Green Terracotta`            |
| **Lime Fighter**    | `Soul Sand` + `Lime Terracotta`             |
| **Pink Fighter**    | `Soul Sand` + `Pink Terracotta`             |
| **Red Fighter**     | `Soul Sand` + `Red Terracotta`              |

### Usable Items by Fighters ⚔️

Equip your fighters with various items to give them the edge in battle:

- **Sticks**: Used as basic weapons for melee attacks.
- **Blaze Rods**: Grants stronger attacks and increased damage.
- **Leather Armor**: Fighters can equip leather armor for better protection in combat, making them more resilient.
